title: xali's Enchanted Books
description: A small CIT that attribute custom textures to enchanted books to be more identifiable.
body: ![](https://i.imgur.com/Ff607Fk.png) # xali's Enchanted Books Trying to find the enchanted book I wanted in a chest full of it have always been a pain to me. This pack aim to resolve that issue by giving every enchanted book a different texture base on their type and their level while keeping an art style that still fit into the base game.  ## Supported Enchants ### Minecraft - All as of 1.21.5 ### Illager Plus - Illager Bane (max level: 7) ### Alex's Mobs - Straddle Jump (max level: 3) - Board Return - Serpentfriend - Lavawax ### Better End Forge - End Veil ### Astral Sorcery - Scorching Heat - Night Vision ### Enchanted Shulkers - Refill - Siphon ### Charm - Acquisition ### VeinMining - Vein Mining ### Nether Depths Upgrade - Hell Strider (max level: 3) ## Requirement For 1.21.1 and under, one of the following mod is required for this pack to work properly: - [**Optifine**](https://optifine.net/downloads) - [**CIT Resewn**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions) - [**EnchantedBookEnabler**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantedbookenabler-datapack) ## Issues ### Optifine **The custom item texture is always the same** - Make sure `ESC/Option/Video Setting/Quality/Custom Item` is set to `ON`. - Make sure the texture pack is enabled - Make sure Optifine is properly installed
